meta.note: Representative output. The live scanner (signal-collect + signal-process) produces this exact report shape from real public data.

raw_samples.title: Aced #7 and have literally no proof
raw_samples.snippet: Made my first hole in one Saturday and there's no record anywhere. Group was on the next tee. Gutted.
raw_samples.label: pain_point

raw_samples.title: Skins math after every round is exhausting
raw_samples.snippet: We spend 20 minutes in the parking lot working out who owes who. There has to be a better way.
raw_samples.label: pain_point

raw_samples.title: Won't pay out
raw_samples.snippet: Entered a contest at my course, supposedly won, never saw a dime. Felt like a scam.
raw_samples.label: pain_point

raw_samples.title: Wish there was a Venmo-style group pot
raw_samples.snippet: Would love to just throw $10 in a pot for nearest the pin and have it auto settle.
raw_samples.label: feature_request

raw_samples.title: Love the GPS but...
raw_samples.snippet: Great rangefinder, but the betting games are clunky and never sync between phones.
raw_samples.label: feature_request

raw_samples.title: Best courses in Monterey?
raw_samples.snippet: Heading out west next month, any must plays?
raw_samples.label: off_topic

themes.title: No proof / record of a hole-in-one
Settle-up after side bets is painful
Side-game scoring doesn't sync between phones

candidates.cluster_theme: No proof / record of a hole-in-one
candidates.problem: Golfers who ace a hole have no trusted record. Partners forget, there's nothing to show or verify later, and the biggest moment in the game evaporates.
candidates.proposed_solution: Auto-mint a verifiable Ace Card (course, hole, date, witnesses) the instant an ace is confirmed; one-tap share to social.
representative_quotes: Made my first ace and there's no record anywhere
Group was on the next tee, no proof

candidates.cluster_theme: Settle-up after side bets is painful
candidates.problem: Groups lose track of who owes whom on skins/nassau and chasing payment after the round kills the vibe.
candidates.proposed_solution: Auto-tallied net positions with a single 'request from group' settle button at the turn and after 18.
representative_quotes: 20 minutes in the parking lot doing the math
Always a mess figuring out who owes what

candidates.problem: Players hesitate to pay into on-course contests because they don't trust the payout will actually happen.
candidates.proposed_solution: Show a reinsured-pot badge + public payout history + 'verified by NiceAce' provenance before the pay step.
representative_quotes: Supposedly won, never saw a dime

candidates.cluster_theme: Side-game scoring doesn't sync between phones
candidates.problem: When a group tracks a money game, scores entered on one phone don't reliably appear on others, causing disputes.
candidates.proposed_solution: Realtime shared scorecard: one source of truth, every player sees live updates.
representative_quotes: We end up with two different scorecards
